issues.description: Trigger should be 'Activated' with scope 'Event' to specify activation of an Event card, not just generic 'Activated'. Current DSL lacks event type specification.

Action type 'TrashFromHand' is incorrect. Card text says 'place 1 card from your hand at the bottom of your deck', which is a return/mill action, not trash. Should use 'ReturnToHand' with destination 'bottom' or a mill-specific action if available in DSL spec.
'Once Per Turn' is a frequency limiter, not a condition. Should be represented as a separate 'frequency' field set to 'OncePerTurn', not as a condition.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [DON!! x1] [Once Per Turn] When you activate an Event, draw 1 card. Then, place 1 card from your hand at the bottom of your deck.
